thesis: You ran direction and detail on the same rails. Claude got it right the first time because you said both the what and the how.

phaseInsights.0: You ran on two rails from session one: clear goals upfront AND precise specs for what came back. Both Description and Delegation firing together.
phaseInsights.1: The combination compounded. Claude got closer on the first try because you'd told it both the what and the how — direction plus detail in the same brief.
phaseInsights.2: By the end the pattern was textbook: orchestrate the setup, shape the output. The only piece you weren't using was discernment — which is your one growth edge.
